description_long: This object is a classic semi-automatic rifle with a wooden stock and forearm, featuring a sleek, elongated profile. The stock is made from polished wood, extending into a metal receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine, visible below the receiver, and a simple set of iron sights mounted along the top of the barrel. The barrel is of standard length and appears to be blued steel, ending with a plain muzzle. The trigger guard and trigger are clearly defined, and the overall finish is a combination of matte wood and smooth metal. The rifle's design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century military carbines, suitable for both urban and rural environments.
description: A classic semi-automatic rifle with a polished wooden stock, metal barrel, and detachable box magazine. It features iron sights and a smooth, streamlined design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, metal barrel, and two detachable box magazines below the receiver.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile of the barrel and stock, with the magazine and trigger area visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal receiver, and both magazines, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the barrel, stock, and the magazine well area.
